content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: It was raining heavily, so Maria put on her ___ and went outside.
distractor_rationale: a dress is not worn over other clothes to protect against rain
a glove covers only the hand and does not protect the body from rain
a cap covers only the head and would not protect the body from heavy rain

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom wore a ___ around his waist to stop his trousers from falling down.
distractor_rationale: a boot is worn on the foot, not around the waist
a hat is worn on the head and cannot hold up trousers
a jacket is worn on the upper body and does not go around the waist to hold trousers up

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The snow was very deep, so Anna wore her ___ to keep her feet warm and dry.
distractor_rationale: gloves cover the hands, not the feet, so they cannot keep feet dry in snow
jeans are trousers and do not cover the feet to keep them dry in deep snow
a belt goes around the waist and cannot protect the feet from snow

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Sara has ___ hair that forms tight ringlets when it gets wet.
distractor_rationale: fashionable describes a style trend, not the physical shape of hair strands
cotton is a fabric material and cannot describe the shape of hair
tall describes height and cannot describe the texture or shape of hair

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The shirt felt soft and light because it was made of pure ___, not a synthetic material.
distractor_rationale: jewellery is a decorative accessory, not a fabric material a shirt can be made of
clothing is a general category word for garments, not a specific fabric material
a glove is a garment for the hand, not a fabric material a shirt is made from

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: James wore a smart ___ over his shirt when he went to the job interview at the office.
distractor_rationale: a dress is a one-piece garment typically worn by women, not over a shirt in a formal male office context
a cap is worn on the head, not over a shirt as a smart garment for an interview
a belt goes around the waist and is not worn over a shirt as a smart outer garment

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Lisa wore a gold necklace and matching earrings — she loved wearing ___ to special occasions.
distractor_rationale: clothing refers to garments worn on the body, not decorative accessories such as necklaces and earrings
cotton is a fabric material and cannot describe necklaces and earrings
boots are footwear and are unrelated to necklaces and earrings

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The doctor asked David his ___ and weight before writing the details on his medical form.
distractor_rationale: clothing is not a physical measurement recorded alongside weight on a medical form
jewellery is a decorative accessory and is not a body measurement recorded on a medical form
dress is a garment or a style of dressing, not a physical measurement like weight

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The new collection at the shop was very ___, with designs that matched the latest trends seen on international runways.
distractor_rationale: curly describes the shape of hair or a line, not the style quality of a clothing collection
cotton is a fabric material and does not describe whether designs follow current trends
tall describes physical height and cannot describe a clothing collection's style

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The charity collected warm ___ such as coats, jumpers, and trousers to give to people who needed them during winter.
distractor_rationale: jewellery refers to decorative accessories and cannot include coats, jumpers, and trousers
height is a physical measurement and is not something that can be collected and given to people to keep warm
cotton is a fabric material, not a category that includes finished garments such as coats and trousers

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom wore his favourite ___ to the party — they were blue and a little too tight around the waist.
distractor_rationale: boots are footwear worn on the feet, not around the waist, so they cannot be tight around the waist
a belt goes around the waist but is a thin strap, not a garment described as blue and tight
a jacket covers the upper body and chest, not the waist area in the way described

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The shirt felt soft and comfortable because it was made of pure ___, which is a natural fabric.
distractor_rationale: clothing is a general word for garments and is not a fabric that a shirt can be made of
jewellery refers to decorative accessories such as rings or necklaces, not a fabric
height refers to how tall something is and has no connection to fabric or material

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Anna has ___ hair that forms tight ringlets, so she uses a special cream to keep it smooth.
distractor_rationale: fashionable describes a style trend and cannot describe the physical shape of hair that forms ringlets
cotton is a fabric material and cannot be used to describe the texture or shape of hair
tall describes vertical height of a person or object and cannot describe the shape of hair strands

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The designer's new collection was considered very ___ because all the top magazines featured it and young people immediately wanted to buy it.
distractor_rationale: curly describes the shape of hair or a curved object and cannot describe a clothing collection's popularity or trend status
cotton describes a type of fabric material and does not describe whether a collection is trendy or widely desired
belted means having a belt attached and describes a specific garment feature, not the overall popularity of an entire collection

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: It was very cold outside, so she put on her warm ___ before leaving the house.
distractor_rationale: a dress is not a warm outer garment worn specifically to protect against cold weather
a cap only covers the head and would not keep the whole body warm
a glove covers only the hand, not the whole body, so it cannot replace a coat here

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom wears a ___ on his head when he plays football to keep the sun out of his eyes.
distractor_rationale: a belt goes around the waist, not on the head
a boot is worn on the foot, not the head
a jacket covers the upper body, not the head

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She wore rubber ___ to walk through the muddy field so her feet stayed completely dry.
distractor_rationale: gloves are worn on the hands and cannot protect the feet from mud
hats are worn on the head and do not keep feet dry
belts go around the waist and have no connection to protecting feet from mud

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: He uses a leather ___ to hold his trousers up because they are a little too big for him.
distractor_rationale: a jacket goes over the upper body and cannot hold trousers up around the waist
a glove covers the hand and has no function in keeping trousers in place
a hat is worn on the head and cannot be used to hold up trousers

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Maria prefers to buy ___ clothes because the fabric is light and comfortable in hot weather.
distractor_rationale: curly describes the shape of hair, not a fabric type for clothing
fashionable describes style or trend, not a material that makes clothes light and breathable
tall describes a person's height and cannot describe a fabric or material

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Anna has ___ hair that forms tight rings, so she spends a long time brushing it every morning.
distractor_rationale: fashionable describes whether something follows current trends, not the physical shape of hair
cotton is a fabric material and cannot describe the texture or shape of someone's hair
slim describes body shape or size, not the form or texture of hair

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The shop sells all kinds of ___, including shirts, trousers, and jackets, for both men and women.
distractor_rationale: jewellery refers to decorative accessories such as rings and necklaces, not shirts or trousers
height is a measurement of how tall something is and is not a category that includes shirts and trousers
cotton is a single fabric type, not a category that covers all types of garments for men and women

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She always wears ___ to formal events — last night she had on a gold necklace and matching earrings.
distractor_rationale: clothing is a general category for garments, not the specific term for necklaces and earrings
gloves are a type of handwear and do not describe necklaces and earrings
boots are footwear and cannot refer to necklaces and earrings

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The doctor asked the patient his ___ and weight before the examination, then wrote both numbers in the medical file.
distractor_rationale: clothing refers to what someone wears and is not a measurement recorded alongside weight
jewellery refers to decorative accessories and is not a physical measurement taken by a doctor
appearance is a general term for how someone looks overall, not a specific numerical measurement paired with weight

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: James bought a pair of dark blue ___ to wear at the weekend because they are comfortable and easy to match with any top.
distractor_rationale: gloves are worn on the hands and do not come in pairs that you wear as trousers at the weekend
belts are accessories worn around the waist and are not described as comfortable trousers to match with a top
coats are outer garments for the whole upper body and are not typically described as dark blue items easy to match with any top in this context

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She always wears ___ clothes because she loves looking stylish. (FASHION)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom wore a warm ___ over his shirt because it was cold outside. (COAT)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The shop sells a wide range of ___, including shirts, trousers, and jackets for men. (CLOTH)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Maria has beautiful ___ hair that falls in tight rings around her face. (CURL)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The store assistant measured his ___ carefully before recommending the right size of jacket. (HIGH)

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: It was raining heavily, so Maria put on her ___ and went outside.
distractor_rationale: a dress is not outerwear worn specifically for rain protection and would get wet
a cap only covers the head and gives no protection from heavy rain on the body
a glove covers only the hand and cannot protect the whole body from rain

duplicate: exact duplicate of a prior item

rejected.rejection_reason: duplicate: exact duplicate of a prior item
